text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Your application for Splash Rec? Don't worry, I got it, all right. I
hope you have fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(T-teacher, you're surprisingly fast with paperwork... I can't cancel it
now.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(How would it look? This is a complete repeat of what happened with
the article. I can't trouble anyone else again...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that right? Thank you very much. I'll be sure to have a great
time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So now I'm officially entered into the competition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm thankful my schedule was open... but Gold Ship has gone too far
this time.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
No doubt. There aren't many who think the whole universe revolves
around themself like she does.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'd say she's the exact opposite of you. Really, you get hung up on
the silliest things, princess.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The silliest things? I do? But I'm a member of the Mejiro family. I have
to conduct myself in a befitting manner!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hah! That right? How splendid of you. But if it were me in your shoes,
I'd have already backed out.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
People who think they're the world are one thing, but people who
constantly worry what the world thinks can be just as foolish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But... I can't...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... I'm so nervous to go into the upperclassmen's room. Errrrgh, don't fail me now, courage! Okay, here... I...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh! If it isn't Chiyo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wagh! M-M-Maruzen! You almost gave me a heart attack!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oops! My bad! ♪ So? Is there something you needed from my class?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, I came to... I came to invite you to something! Um, have you
ever heard of Splash Rec?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's part of Summer Walk... So, since you like resorts and stuff, I was
wondering if you'd go with me... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Splash Rec? Well... I know it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, don't tell me, do you already have plans for that date? I'm sorry
for the random invite!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: No, it's fine! No problemo! A resort vacation sounds totally groovy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: A-are you sure? I'm so glad!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
We can throw on our raddest swimsuits and make this summer da
bomb! ☆ Can't wait! Woohooo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(Maruzen... Is she really okay with it? Something seemed different
about her when she answered...)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did ya hear? Maruzen's gonna be in Splash Rec this year. They
say she hasn't done it since her first summer here!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
No way. Isn't that the time she won? That's one killer Uma joining this
one! I might have to go see the finals...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(So that's it. Maruzen's amazing! But wait, doesn't that mean she
hasn't participated ever since then?)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huuuuh... I wonder if something happened...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In no time at all, the day of the preliminaries is here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Raaaargh! I'm pumped! No one can keep up with my mad fishing lure
skills!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You sure are confident, Golshi! ♪ But I'm going to give you a run for
your money! Yeah, yeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? We have to use fishing rods in the first round? What do I do—I
didn't bring one!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We won't be using anything like that, so you can relax. Remember,
the instructions were written on item number four.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right! Ehehe, I kind of lost it since I'm so nervous.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So, um, the contests listed were the 200-meter freestyle, floating
island race, tightrope quiz, and 3,000-meter super
freestyle—equipment allowed!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: It's a point system based on order finished, with the top eight advancing to the finals. Meaning it'll test mind, skill, and body. This should be good.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
We will now be starting the 200-meter freestyle! Please take your
places at the poolside!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yo, yo, McQueen. What's with the sulky face? You still sour milk or
what?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Not one bit. I'm all in once I've made a decision. A win worthy of the
Mejiro name will be mine.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ooo! That's what I wanted to hear! Come at me with all you've
got—defeating you will make my victory all the sweeter!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and who do you think you're speaking to? I'm going to make you
regret having me participate.
